title: Barriers and facilitators for fitness center participation among adult people with or without physical disabilities: A systematic scoping review protocol
author: Nikolajsen, Helene
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This scoping review protocol is based on the “JBI Scoping Review SR Protocol template”. The protocol is an a priori protocol of a coming scoping review article. This protocol is now available with open access to ensure transparency of the method, as the guideline for scoping review prescribe.
steps_raw: This scoping review protocol is based on the “JBI Scoping Review SR Protocol template”. The protocol is an a priori protocol of a coming scoping review article. This protocol is now available with open access to ensure transparency of the method, as the guideline for scoping review prescribe.
keywords: Barriers, Facilitators, Fitness center, Participation, Scoping review
